import platform
import os
import torch
os_name = platform.system()
arch = platform.machine()
torch_path = os.path.dirname(torch.__file__)
torch_lib = os.path.join(torch_path, "lib")
cuda_libs = [f for f in os.listdir(torch_lib) if "cuda" in f.lower()] if os.path.exists(torch_lib) else []
result = f"{os_name}|{arch}|{len(cuda_libs)}|{torch_lib}"
